title: Next.js App Router + TypeScript + Bun scaffold
description: Create a runnable Next.js (App Router) project managed with Bun: package.json scripts, tsconfig, ESLint, baseline app layout, and README documenting install, dev, build, lint, and test entry points plus an explicit Windows smoke checklist for the SQLite integration path (install/build/dev) without coupling to domain code.
acceptance: Repository contains a Next.js App Router + TypeScript app runnable via documented Bun commands (install, dev, build).
README documents Windows-focused smoke steps for validating Bun + Next + future SQLite driver install/build/dev assumptions.
Source tree reserves clear locations for inner layers per architecture-brief (e.g. domain/application folders or documented follow-up paths) without placing SQLite drivers in client bundles.
ESLint (or equivalent) is configured and invocable via a documented script.
No mutable global SQLite connection or undocumented singleton persistence is introduced at this stage.
